Graphitic Energy

Graphithic

Graphitic Energy is highly relevant to the Green Molecules™ industry because its methane pyrolysis technology offers a pathway to produce clean hydrogen from natural gas without releasing CO₂ emissions. By converting natural gas into hydrogen and solid carbon, Graphitic Energy enables gas utilities and producers to participate in the low-carbon energy transition, leveraging existing gas infrastructure while reducing the carbon footprint of industrial hydrogen production.

Headquarters
Santa Barbara, CA
Founders
Founder
Zach Jones; Eric McFarland, MD, PhD
Investment
August 28, 2024
Back to Portfolio

Together we can meet the energy demands for a prosperous and secure future.
